# Security trust route

## When to use

Use for B2B/enterprise SaaS.

## Why it works

Reduces IT/security risk.

## Mechanism

Many deals fail from risk, not interest.

## Required inputs

Security page, SOC notes, data handling, SSO.

## When not to use

If claims are not true.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Security page views, enterprise lead quality.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
